title: Historical Post-023 Test Artifact Publication Or Rollback Decision
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 post-trial publication-or-rollback decision slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-024` post-trial publication-or-rollback decision slice
objective: Decide whether the Packet 023 host-side operations-web test-only artifact should be published through the parent-root authority path or reverted/deferred, without treating the trial as migration approval or mutating runtime, services, packages, production source, remotes, or the preserved old clone.
active_role: Olares Host Test Artifact Decision Operator
required_inputs: Current `/home/olares/code/apex` git status and diff for `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`
Packet 023 validation evidence, including the no-install skips for typecheck and browser smoke
Current workstation parent-root status at `C:/APEX Platform`
constrained_outputs: A dated decision handoff choosing publication-first, rollback-first, or defer-with-specific-blockers for the Packet 023 test artifact
No publication commit unless a separate later publication packet is opened

No runtime mutation, service change, install work, package change, production-source edit, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or migration approval
validation_steps: Reconfirm the host artifact is limited to `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
Reconfirm no production source, package, lockfile, env, generated, runtime, service, ingress, auth, remote, or old-clone surfaces changed.
Classify the skipped typecheck and browser-smoke validations as acceptable for publication planning, blockers requiring rollback/defer, or reasons to open a narrower validation packet.
Name exactly one next packet after the decision.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only a decision handoff for the Packet 023 test artifact. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, production-source changes, publication commits, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Complete. Packet 024 revalidated that the Packet 023 host artifact remains limited to `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` and that host-side executable validation was skipped only because dependencies and Playwright were absent under the no-install boundary. Because the workstation already has `apps/operations-web/node_modules`, the `typecheck` and `smoke:browser` scripts, and a local Playwright Chromium cache, Packet 024 chose defer-with-specific-blockers instead of publication-first or rollback-first.
next_action: Open only the separate Packet 025 bounded workstation validation lane to mirror the exact Packet 023 test diff into the workstation copy, run no-install local `pnpm --dir apps/operations-web typecheck` and `pnpm --dir apps/operations-web smoke:browser`, and record whether later publication, rollback, or a sharper blocker classification is justified. Do not publish, revert, migrate, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, edit package or lock files, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone from Packet 024 alone.
